MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. Lois Jones.
Appearances:
Eric Lifschitz, Esq. for Plaintiff Kathy Tang, the guardian ad litem for the minors, Ryan Dang and Justin Dang.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise to the "structured settlement", terms stated in the proposed order signed in open court (see scanned document).
